ref_text_raw: Sleep interruption is the process of purposefully awakening during your normal sleep period and falling asleep a short time later (10–60 minutes).
ref_text_normalized: sleep interruption is the process of purposefully awakening during your normal sleep period and falling asleep a short time later 10–60 minutes
text: Sleep interruption is the process of purposely awakening during your normal sleep period and falling asleep a short time later, 10 to 16 minutes.

raw_response.text: Sleep interruption is the process of purposely awakening during your normal sleep period and falling asleep a short time later, 10 to 16 minutes.
